  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (5:22-5:27) TS377061: This code uses the global `fetch` function, HTTP requests are represented through `HttpClient` from `effect/unstable/http`. effect(globalFetch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetch for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetch for entire file"
